summary: Iteration 37: CRITICAL AUTH FIX VERIFIED - All 14 backend tests passed, full e2e login flow working. The supabase_admin=None bug in auth_supabase.py was successfully fixed by changing 'from supabase_client import supabase_admin' to 'from supabase_client import init_supabase; supabase_admin = init_supabase()'. Authenticated endpoints now return 200 instead of 401.

minor.issue: Endpoint doesn't exist - use /api/auth/supabase/login instead (docs mentioned signin)

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: auth_supabase.py line 11-13 correctly initializes supabase_admin via init_supabase() call
PASS: All protected endpoints return 401 without token
PASS: All protected endpoints return 200 with valid token
PASS: Login returns valid JWT token from Supabase
PASS: OAuth URL generates correctly for Google provider

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, responsive design works, auth flow works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth crisis RESOLVED. The critical bug where supabase_admin was None (due to Python import binding capturing value at import time instead of reference) is fixed. Full login flow verified working: login -> token -> authenticated API calls -> calibration page access.

backend_api.calibration_status: PASS - GET /api/calibration/status returns 200 with token (WAS 401 BEFORE FIX)
backend_api.unauthenticated_protection: PASS - Protected endpoints return 401 without token

frontend.landing_page: PASS - Business Clarity, Mastered headline, Live Sentinel Feed, AES-256 badge
frontend.trust_page: PASS - THE VAULT, Trust & Security, AES-256, Australian Data Sovereignty
frontend.login_page: PASS - Email/password form, Google OAuth, Microsoft OAuth
frontend.login_flow: PASS - Login -> Token -> Redirect to /calibration with user session

responsive_design.mobile_375x844: PASS - No horizontal overflow, content stacks properly

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Python import binding issue in auth_supabase.py. The statement 'from supabase_client import supabase_admin' captures the VALUE of supabase_admin at import time (which was None before init_supabase() was called). Even after init_supabase() sets the actual client, auth_supabase.py still had None because it captured the original value, not a reference.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed line 11 from 'from supabase_client import supabase_admin' to 'from supabase_client import init_supabase' and added line 13 'supabase_admin = init_supabase()' to directly call the initialization function.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All authenticated endpoints now return 200 with valid token instead of 401. Login flow works end-to-end in both API and UI.
